prompt: Run the e2e judge against the deployed EAGLE app. Just do login, home, and chat journeys. The ALB URL is http://EagleC-Front-XYyWWR29wzVZ-745394335.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com and credentials are testuser@example.com / EagleTest2024!

assertions.text: Uses the e2e_judge_orchestrator.py as the entry point
Passes the ALB URL via --base-url flag
Passes auth credentials via --auth-email and --auth-password flags
Mentions expected output: results JSON, markdown report, and screenshots directory
Includes pre-flight checks (AWS creds, playwright installed, URL reachable)
